name: Memory Only No Checkpoint Assessment Pipeline
description: Memory-heavy artifact workflow with assessment but no checkpoints.
outcome: Workspace-memory-driven work remains valid without milestone checkpoints.

definition.process_instructions: The memory brief lead drafts the output primarily in artifacts and workspace memory. The acceptance assessor reviews it. The release editor finalizes it. This workflow intentionally uses no checkpoints.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: memory-flow
stages.goal: The memory-backed draft is delivered and assessed.

stages.name: memory-release
stages.goal: The final memory-backed packet is complete.
